faqs.question: What is your typical project timeline?
faqs.answer: Most projects run 4-12 weeks depending on scope. We'll share a detailed timeline during discovery.

faqs.question: Do you work with startups?
faqs.answer: Yes! We've helped startups raise over $450M through better product experiences.

faqs.question: What's your pricing model?
faqs.answer: We offer both project-based and retainer pricing. Let's discuss what works best for your needs.

faqs.question: Can you work with our existing development team?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We integrate seamlessly with engineering teams and provide developer-ready handoffs.

nextSteps.text: Our UX Expert will collect project details and create a brief.
We'll prepare estimates and share a project proposal.
